creator: vmagerya@gmail.com
text:
Navigate to [1] and look at section 19.12.8.1: you'll find a link
to [2] there; that link does not work -- directory does not exist.
The directory with iso images has moved to [3], but there is no
livefs image there either.

In short, section 19.12.8.1 is in need of an update.

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/backup-basics.html
[2] ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/ISO-IMAGES/9.0/FreeBSD-9.0-RELEASE-i386-livefs.iso
[3] ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/i386/ISO-IMAGES/9.0/
